column2: Carboplatin may be offered to patients with TNBC to increase pathologic complete response. There is currently insufﬁcient evidence to support adding immune checkpoint
Omitted nonspecific remission and response concepts; retained the neoadjuvant-treatment-specific response concept despite moderate distance because it was the only active clinically plausible match.
You can approve expansions or individual codes. Approving an expansion is an intentional valueset, whereas individual codes are extensional rules.
